tasks.title: Create src/lib/db.ts with SQLite schema
tasks.description: Create src/lib/db.ts using better-sqlite3. Initialize tables: users (id TEXT PRIMARY KEY, username TEXT UNIQUE, password_hash TEXT, is_admin INTEGER DEFAULT 0, created_at TEXT), tournaments (id, name, year, lock_time_groups, lock_time_knockout, bracket_data JSON, results_data JSON), predictions (id, user_id, tournament_id, bracket_name, group_predictions JSON, third_place_picks JSON, knockout_picks JSON, tiebreaker INTEGER, submitted_at TEXT), groups (id, name, invite_code TEXT UNIQUE, created_by, created_at, scoring_settings JSON, max_brackets INTEGER, submissions_locked INTEGER DEFAULT 0), group_members (group_id, prediction_id, PRIMARY KEY), messages (id, group_id, user_id, username, message, created_at). DB file at data/worldcup.db. Auto-create data/ directory. Export getDb() function.

tasks.title: Create src/lib/auth.ts with JWT and password hashing
tasks.description: Create src/lib/auth.ts with functions: hashPassword(password) using bcryptjs, verifyPassword(password, hash), signToken(payload) using jsonwebtoken with a secret from process.env.JWT_SECRET (default fallback for dev), verifyToken(token). Token payload should include {userId, username, isAdmin}. Export all functions. Same pattern as March Madness auth.ts.

tasks.title: Create auth API route (register + login)
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/auth/route.ts. POST handler that accepts {action: 'register'|'login', username, password}. Register: validate inputs, hash password, insert into users table, return JWT in Set-Cookie httpOnly cookie. Login: find user, verify password, return JWT cookie. Return appropriate error messages for duplicate username, wrong password, etc.

tasks.title: Create useAuth hook and AuthProvider
tasks.description: Create src/hooks/useAuth.tsx. React context provider that manages auth state. On mount, check for existing JWT cookie by calling a /api/auth GET endpoint (add GET handler to auth route that verifies token and returns user). Expose: user, login(username, password), register(username, password), logout(). Login/register call the POST API and update state. Logout clears the cookie. Wrap the app in AuthProvider in layout.tsx.

tasks.title: Create ThemeRegistry with dark/light mode
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/ThemeRegistry.tsx — MUI ThemeProvider with Emotion cache, dark/light mode support. Create src/hooks/useThemeMode.tsx — hook that reads/writes theme preference to localStorage, defaults to dark. Create src/app/globals.css with minimal resets. Update src/app/layout.tsx to wrap children in ThemeRegistry and AuthProvider (if TASK-004 is done, otherwise just ThemeRegistry).

tasks.title: Create AuthForm component
tasks.description: Create src/components/auth/AuthForm.tsx — MUI-styled login/register form. Toggle between login and register modes. Username and password fields. Submit calls useAuth().login or register. Show error messages. Redirect to home on success.

tasks.title: Create Navbar component
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/Navbar.tsx — MUI AppBar with navigation links: Home, Predictions, Leaderboard, Groups, Stats. Show Admin link if user.is_admin. Theme toggle button (dark/light). Auth status: show username + logout button if logged in, login button if not. Add Navbar to layout.tsx.

tasks.title: Create CountdownTimer component
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/CountdownTimer.tsx — displays countdown to a target date. Shows days, hours, minutes, seconds. Updates every second via setInterval. Accepts targetDate prop (ISO string). Shows 'Locked' when past. Used on home page for group stage lock time.

tasks.title: Create home page with tournament info and countdown
tasks.description: Update src/app/page.tsx to be a proper landing page. 'use client'. Fetch active tournament from /api/tournaments (create GET route that returns the latest tournament). Show tournament name, year, countdown to group stage lock time using CountdownTimer. Show login/register CTA if not authenticated (render AuthForm), or welcome message if logged in. Link to predictions page.

tasks.title: Create tournament API routes
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/tournaments/route.ts — GET returns the latest tournament (most recent by year). Create src/app/api/admin/route.ts — POST creates a new tournament (admin only). Accepts: name, year, lock_time_groups, lock_time_knockout, bracket_data (JSON with 12 groups of 4 teams each). Verify auth token and is_admin before allowing creation.

tasks.title: Create bracketData utility functions
tasks.description: Create src/lib/bracketData.ts — utility functions: parseBracketData(tournament) returns typed BracketData, getTeamByName(bracketData, name) returns Team, getGroupByName(bracketData, name) returns Group, getTeamSeed(team) returns groupSeed, getTeamRanking(team) returns fifaRanking. Also export a placeholder WORLD_CUP_2026 constant with 12 groups of 4 placeholder teams (use real team names if 2026 draw is known, otherwise use representative teams with realistic FIFA rankings and pot assignments).

tasks.title: Create admin page for tournament management
tasks.description: Create src/app/admin/page.tsx — 'use client', admin-only page. Form to create a tournament: name, year, lock times (datetime pickers). For bracket_data: either paste JSON or use the placeholder data from bracketData.ts. Submit calls POST /api/admin. Show existing tournament info. Admin can also update results (group stage results entry will be a separate task).

tasks.title: Create group stage scoring function
tasks.description: Create src/lib/scoring.ts with scoreGroupStage(predictions, results, settings). For each group: for each team compute advance_correct (boolean match), exact_position (position match), upset_bonus (max(0, seed - predicted_position) only if team finished at or above predicted position). Compute per-group advancement_correct_bonus (all 4 advance/not-advance correct) and perfect_order_bonus (all 4 exact). Return detailed breakdown per team and per group plus total. All point values from ScoringSettings.groupStage. Pure function, no side effects.

tasks.title: Create knockout scoring function
tasks.description: Add scoreKnockout(picks, results, teamRankings, settings) to src/lib/scoring.ts. For each knockout match: if user picked the correct winner, award base points for that round. If it was an upset (winner has higher FIFA ranking number than loser), compute floor(ranking_diff / modulus) * round_multiplier. Add champion bonus if user picked the tournament winner. Return breakdown per round plus total. Add scoreTotalPrediction() that combines group + knockout scores.

tasks.title: Create scoring unit tests
tasks.description: Add vitest to devDependencies. Create vitest.config.ts. Create tests/scoring.test.ts. Test cases: (1) advance_correct for all scenarios (predicted advance + did, predicted not + didn't, predicted advance + didn't, etc), (2) exact_position, (3) upset bonus capping at prediction not actual, (4) upset bonus = 0 when team finishes below prediction, (5) advancement_correct_bonus independent of perfect_order_bonus, (6) 3rd-place advancement interaction, (7) knockout base points per round, (8) knockout upset formula with modulus, (9) champion bonus, (10) full scoreTotalPrediction integration test.

tasks.title: Create predictions API (save/load group predictions)
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/picks/route.ts. POST: save group_predictions (array of 12 group orders) and third_place_picks (array of 8 team names). Requires auth. Check lock_time_groups — reject if past lock time. Upsert: if prediction exists for this user+tournament, update it; otherwise insert. GET: return user's predictions for the active tournament. Include bracket_name support for multiple brackets per user.

tasks.title: Create GroupPrediction component (single group reorder)
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/GroupPrediction.tsx — displays one group of 4 teams. Each team row shows: position number (1-4), team flag/logo, team name, pot seed badge, FIFA ranking. User can reorder by clicking up/down arrows or drag-and-drop. Emits onChange(groupName, newOrder) when order changes. MUI Card with List inside. Highlight pot seed with a small colored chip.

tasks.title: Create group stage predictions page with all 12 groups
tasks.description: Create src/app/bracket/page.tsx — 'use client'. Fetch active tournament and user's existing predictions. Display all 12 groups in a responsive grid (3 columns desktop, 2 tablet, 1 mobile) using GroupPrediction components. Below the groups, show a 3rd-place advancement picker: list all 12 predicted 3rd-place teams (derived from group orders), user checks exactly 8. Save button calls POST /api/picks. Disable editing if past lock time. Show CountdownTimer to lock.

tasks.title: Create knockout bracket generation from group results
tasks.description: Create src/lib/knockoutBracket.ts. Export generateKnockoutBracket(groupResults, advancingThirdPlace) that returns an array of KnockoutMatchup objects for all 31 knockout matches. Follow FIFA's official R32 bracket mapping for the 48-team format (group winners vs advancing 3rd-place teams or runners-up from specific groups). Each matchup has an id encoding round and position (e.g. 'R32-1', 'R16-3', 'QF-2', 'SF-1', '3RD', 'FINAL').

tasks.title: Create admin group stage results entry
tasks.description: Extend src/app/admin/page.tsx: add a section for entering group stage results. For each group, admin selects the finishing order (1-4) and marks which 3rd-place teams advanced. Submit saves to tournament.results_data via a new PUT /api/admin endpoint. On save, auto-generate the knockout bracket using generateKnockoutBracket() and store it in results_data.

tasks.title: Create Matchup component for knockout bracket
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/Matchup.tsx — displays a single knockout matchup. Two team slots (teamA, teamB) with flag, name, seed/ranking. Click a team to pick the winner (highlighted). If in read-only mode (results entered), show the actual winner highlighted differently. Accepts onPick(matchupId, winner) callback. Show connector lines to next round via CSS. Same visual pattern as March Madness Matchup.tsx.

tasks.title: Create KnockoutBracket component
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/KnockoutBracket.tsx — full bracket view from R32 to Final including 3rd place match. Renders Matchup components arranged in columns by round with connector lines. Cascade clearing: when user changes a pick in an earlier round, clear all downstream picks that depended on the changed team. Accept picks state and onPick callback. Desktop layout: all rounds visible left-to-right.

tasks.title: Create knockout predictions page
tasks.description: Create src/app/bracket/knockout/page.tsx — 'use client'. Only accessible after group stage results are entered (check tournament.results_data). Fetch knockout bracket structure and user's existing knockout picks. Render KnockoutBracket component. Tiebreaker input at the bottom (predict total goals in Final). Save button calls POST /api/picks with knockout_picks. Disable if past lock_time_knockout.

tasks.title: Create responsive bracket layouts (mobile + tablet)
tasks.description: Create src/components/bracket/MobileBracket.tsx — round tabs for mobile (<768px). User taps tab to switch between R32, R16, QF, SF, Final. Each tab shows that round's matchups vertically. Create src/components/bracket/MediumBracket.tsx — tablet layout (768-1200px) with stacked bracket sections. Add screen width detection in KnockoutBracket to switch between mobile/medium/desktop layouts.

tasks.title: Create groups API (create, join, leave, list)
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/groups/route.ts. POST with action 'create': create group with name, scoring_settings (JSON), max_brackets. Generate unique invite_code (6-char alphanumeric). POST with action 'join': find group by invite_code, add user's prediction to group_members. DELETE: leave group. GET: list user's groups with member counts.

tasks.title: Create ScoringEditor component
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/ScoringEditor.tsx — MUI form to configure all scoring parameters. Group stage section: advanceCorrect, exactPosition, upsetBonusPerPlace, advancementCorrectBonus, perfectOrderBonus (all number inputs). Knockout section: pointsPerRound (6 inputs for each round), upsetMultiplierPerRound (6 inputs), upsetModulus, championBonus. Pre-fill with DEFAULT_SCORING. Emit onChange(settings) with the full ScoringSettings object.

tasks.title: Create groups page UI
tasks.description: Create src/app/groups/page.tsx — 'use client'. List user's groups with member count and invite code. Create group form: name input + ScoringEditor + max_brackets. Join group form: invite code input. Each group card links to the group's leaderboard. Show group scoring settings summary.

tasks.title: Create leaderboard API
tasks.description: Create src/app/api/leaderboard/route.ts. GET with group_id param. Fetch all predictions in the group via group_members. Fetch tournament results. For each prediction, run scoreTotalPrediction() with the group's scoring_settings. Return sorted array of LeaderboardEntry objects (sorted by totalScore desc, tiebreaker as secondary).

tasks.title: Create leaderboard page
tasks.description: Create src/app/leaderboard/page.tsx — 'use client'. Group selector dropdown (user's groups). Fetch leaderboard for selected group. MUI Table with sortable columns: rank, username, bracket name, group stage score, knockout score, total score, tiebreaker. Clickable scores open a ScoringBreakdownDialog showing per-pick detail.

tasks.title: Create ScoringBreakdownDialog
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/ScoringBreakdownDialog.tsx — MUI Dialog that shows detailed scoring breakdown for a prediction. Group stage tab: per-group table showing each team's advance_correct, exact_position, upset_bonus, and group bonuses. Knockout tab: per-round table showing each pick, whether correct, base points, upset bonus. Totals at bottom.

tasks.title: Create admin knockout results entry
tasks.description: Extend admin page: add knockout results section. Show the generated knockout bracket. Admin clicks to set the winner of each match as results come in. Save updates tournament.results_data. Leaderboard auto-recalculates on next fetch.

tasks.title: Create ESPN live score sync
tasks.description: Create src/lib/espnSync.ts — fetch live World Cup scores from ESPN's soccer scoreboard API. Parse game data into LiveGame objects. Create src/hooks/useLiveScores.ts — hook that polls ESPN every 30 seconds during match days. Create src/components/bracket/LiveScores.tsx — displays in-progress match scores in a compact card format.

tasks.title: Create compare predictions page
tasks.description: Create src/app/compare/page.tsx — overlay comparison of multiple users' group predictions and knockout picks. Dropdown to select up to 4 users from the same group. Show one bracket/group view with colored indicators per user (e.g. colored dots or borders). Same pattern as March Madness compare page.

tasks.title: Create Who Picked Whom page
tasks.description: Create src/app/whopicked/page.tsx — per-match breakdown of group members' picks. Group selector. For group stage: show each group with a table of who predicted which team in which position. For knockout: show each matchup with who picked which team. Highlight correct picks.

tasks.title: Create stats dashboard
tasks.description: Create src/app/stats/page.tsx — aggregate prediction statistics for a group. Most popular champion pick (bar chart or list). Most contrarian predictions (picks that differ most from the group). Group stage accuracy stats (% of users who got each group right). Most chalk vs most upset-heavy brackets.

tasks.title: Create What-If simulator page
tasks.description: Create src/app/simulate/page.tsx — bracket view where user clicks to set hypothetical results. Live leaderboard sidebar re-sorts as user sets results. Group selector. Reuse KnockoutBracket component in 'simulation mode' where clicks set results instead of picks. Recalculate all group members' scores with the hypothetical results on each change.

tasks.title: Create Monte Carlo simulation
tasks.description: Create src/lib/monteCarloWorker.ts — web worker that runs N simulations (default 1000) of remaining knockout matches using historical upset rates or FIFA ranking-based probabilities. For each simulation, score all predictions and track avg score, avg place, win %. Create src/hooks/useMonteCarlo.ts. Integrate into simulator page: show Monte Carlo results table with each user's win probability.

tasks.title: Create group chat
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/GroupChat.tsx — simple message thread per group. Text input + send button. Messages show username, timestamp, message text. Fetch messages from /api/groups/messages (create endpoint). Poll for new messages every 10 seconds. Add to groups page or as a collapsible panel on the leaderboard.

tasks.title: Create pick reminder banner
tasks.description: Create src/components/common/PickReminderBanner.tsx — shows a warning banner when lock time is approaching and user hasn't completed their predictions. Check: if within 24 hours of lock_time_groups and group predictions are incomplete, show banner. Same for lock_time_knockout. Dismissible but re-appears on page navigation. Add to layout.

tasks.title: Create shareable public bracket links
tasks.description: Create src/app/bracket/[username]/page.tsx — public read-only view of a user's predictions. No auth required. Shows group predictions and knockout bracket (if filled). Share button copies URL to clipboard. Add share button to the predictions page.

tasks.title: Create print-friendly bracket view
tasks.description: Add @media print CSS to globals.css that hides navbar, sidebars, buttons and formats the bracket for printing. Add a Print button to the bracket page that calls window.print(). Also add bracket export as image using html2canvas (same pattern as March Madness).
